layers.name: background_canvas
layers.description: The base layer of the painting, featuring a light, slightly textured off-white paper canvas, characteristic of traditional Chinese ink wash art.
layers.regeneration_prompt: A light, slightly textured off-white paper canvas, in the style of traditional Chinese ink wash painting, full canvas.

layers.name: distant_mountains
layers.description: Majestic, rugged mountains rendered with varying shades of dark gray and black ink washes, forming the upper background landscape, partially obscured by atmospheric effects.
layers.regeneration_prompt: Majestic, rugged mountains rendered with varying shades of dark gray and black ink washes, in the style of traditional Chinese ink wash painting, on a transparent background.

layers.name: mist_and_clouds
layers.description: Ethereal, soft-edged white and light gray mist and clouds that drift through the mountain valleys and peaks, creating depth and a serene, atmospheric effect.
layers.regeneration_prompt: Ethereal, soft-edged white and light gray mist and clouds drifting through mountain valleys and peaks, in the style of traditional Chinese ink wash painting, on a transparent background.

layers.name: midground_landscape
layers.description: Detailed midground landscape featuring green-tinged rocky hills, ancient pine trees, a small traditional pavilion, a winding path, and a cascading river with waterfalls.
layers.regeneration_prompt: Detailed midground landscape with green-tinged rocky hills, ancient gnarled pine trees, a small traditional pavilion with a brown roof, a winding dirt path, and a cascading river with white waterfalls, in the style of traditional Chinese ink wash painting, on a transparent background.

layers.name: calligraphy_and_seals
layers.description: Black calligraphic text arranged vertically in the upper right corner, accompanied by two vibrant red square seals, typical of traditional Chinese art.
layers.regeneration_prompt: Black calligraphic text arranged vertically in the upper right corner, with two vibrant red square seals, in the style of traditional Chinese ink wash painting, on a transparent background.
